## Software

**etverse: Modular R ecosystem for transparent causal inference** [[github.com/etverse]](https://github.com/etverse)\
Software | In development\
Includes: **causatr** (causal effects estimation), **negatr** (negative control analysis), **matchatr** (matched case-control and case-cohort study analysis), and **survatr** (survival analysis).

```{r}
render_talks(software)
```
